veteran.name: Asha Rourke
veteran.title: Dust veteran
veteran.line: The storm wall is thin on the shelf road. It costs power now, but it keeps the hull out of the basalt teeth.
veteran.recommendation: Take the shelf road and spend power to protect the hull.

liaison.name: Director Hale
liaison.title: UNOMA logistics
liaison.line: Corporate telemetry shows the direct regolith lane is open. Keep your power reserve and accept some cosmetic hull abrasion.
liaison.recommendation: Stay direct and conserve power for the next sector.

veteran.name: Mina Sato
veteran.title: Basalt guide
veteran.line: Pavonis shade fools the temperature model. Rest the crew and run meager until the ridge light turns clean.
veteran.recommendation: Spend food discipline now to protect morale and hull later.

liaison.name: Orin Kline
liaison.title: Route auditor
liaison.line: The route window is profitable only if you leave before the afternoon dust. Push through with the depot exchange.
liaison.recommendation: Trade into oxygen and keep the schedule.

veteran.name: Tavi Beko
veteran.title: Canyon scout
veteran.line: The canyon mouth is eating axles. Water hurts less than a cracked suspension. Cut wide around the ribs.
veteran.recommendation: Spend water on the longer canyon skirt and spare the hull.

liaison.name: Sera Marwick
liaison.title: Claims liaison
liaison.line: The corridor is rough, but it is short. Korolev bonuses disappear if you crawl the scenic route.
liaison.recommendation: Punch the direct corridor and preserve expedition time.
